title: falsifier_health.sh STATUS disambiguation — HIT-via-grep-shortcircuit vs TRUE ERROR
trigger: Prior meta-falsifier audit: F46/F47 xpoll convention guards reported as ERROR despite working as designed. Root cause: canonical idiom `! grep -qE PATTERN && echo SENTINEL` short-circuits to ec=1 on grep miss (or negated hit), never emits sentinel — old logic mapped any ec≠0 to ERROR, conflating REAL faults with HIT-via-shortcircuit.

F46_xpoll_sigma_convention_guard.semantic: 9 xpoll-sigma violations present → grep matches → ! grep ec=1 → no echo → HIT (correct)

F47_xpoll_tau_convention_guard.semantic: 11 xpoll-tau violations present → grep matches → ! grep ec=1 → no echo → HIT (correct)

investigation.old_logic: ec=0 → CLEAN-or-HIT branch; else ERROR (single bucket for all non-zero)
investigation.conflation: true grep regex error (ec=2), file-not-found (ec=1), bare false (ec=1), and HIT-via-grep-shortcircuit (ec=1) all collapsed to ERROR

heuristic.rule: ec=1 + cmd contains `grep -q[EF]?` token → HIT-via-shortcircuit, else preserve ERROR
non_trivial_evidence: ec=2 with grep cmd → still ERROR (regex syntax fault)
ec=1 with non-grep cmd (cat, [, test) → still ERROR (true fault)
ec=1 with grep cmd → HIT (falsifier doing its job)
heuristic.raw_73_compliance: did NOT rebrand all ec=1 as HIT; required co-presence of grep-q token in CMD to admit reclassification

diff_summary: + elif [ "$EC" = "1" ] && printf '%s' "$CMD" | grep -qE 'grep -q(E|F)?[[:space:]]'; then STATUS=HIT branch

verification.before_sentinel: __FALSIFIER_HEALTH__ FAIL total=84 clean=82 hit=0 error=2 duration_ms=15000
verification.after_sentinel: __FALSIFIER_HEALTH__ FAIL total=84 clean=82 hit=2 error=0 tampered=0 duration_ms=16000
f46_f47_lines: F46   xpoll-sigma-convention-guard   HIT   ec=1   7ms   reason=anchor_grep_miss   fix=audit_atlas_for_drift
F47   xpoll-tau-convention-guard     HIT   ec=1   8ms   reason=anchor_grep_miss   fix=audit_atlas_for_drift

edge_case.synthetic_registry: tmpdir 3-entry: FE1 grep-bad-regex (ec=2), FE2 file-missing cat (ec=1, no grep), FE3 bare test (ec=1, no grep)
edge_case.observed: FE1 ERROR ec=2, FE2 ERROR ec=1, FE3 ERROR ec=1 — total=3 clean=0 hit=0 error=3
edge_case.outcome: PASS — heuristic correctly refuses to reclassify ec=1 sourced from non-grep failure modes

constraints_satisfied.raw_73_non_trivial_heuristic: ec=1 alone insufficient; requires CMD to contain grep -q token

follow_ups.atlas_health_timeline_recompute: next cron tick will append corrected JSONL line to /Users/ghost/core/nexus/state/atlas_health_timeline.jsonl
follow_ups.future_extension: consider sub-status TAMPERED/SPOOF/HIT-shortcircuit/HIT-no-sentinel/ERROR-grep-syntax/ERROR-other in --json output for atlas-side stratification
